title: AI-SDLC DesignIntentDocument
description: Authoritative artifact defining the product's design intent at the strategic level. Shared root of the triad's design axis — both PPA and DesignSystemBinding reference it. Contains split-authority stewardship (product + design + shared + engineering review), soulPurpose (mission, design principles), structured Addendum B fields (constraints, scope boundaries, anti-patterns, measurable signals) with identityClass markers, brandIdentity, experientialTargets, and planned changes for Design→Engineering lookahead.

parentTessellation.description: Present only on Soul DIDs. References the parent Tessellated DID's URI (RFC-0009 §5.3).

plannedChanges.description: Planned design changes surfaced to engineering for lookahead (RFC-0008 §A.9).

variants.description: In-Soul Variant declarations per RFC-0017 §5.1. Each variant carries distinct visual identity specializations and audience targeting while inheriting the parent Soul DID's compliance regime and substrate invariants.

identityClass.description: Identity class per Addendum B. `core` fields trigger full-backlog re-score on change; `evolving` fields only re-score the admission queue. Also weights BM25 corpus construction (core=2x, evolving=1x).

triad.description: The Fractal Triad (RFC-0009 §5.1). Required on every DID — single-product, Tessellated, and Soul. Carries the three pillar-authority declarations: design (expression), engineering (coherence), product (identity). `init` scaffolds ${operator} as default for all three authorities on single-product DIDs.

design.description: Design vertex — accountable for identity expression at this DID's scope.

authority.description: Principal accountable for the design vertex at this DID's scope. Defaults to ${operator} on init for single-product DIDs.

inheritsFrom.description: Path to parent DID's design vertex. Null/absent for top-level Tessellated DIDs and single-product DIDs.

imperatives.description: Soul-specific design imperatives (voice register, visual identity specialization, experiential invariants).

overrides.description: Soul-specific overrides of parent Tessellated DID's design vertex declarations.

engineering.description: Engineering vertex — accountable for coherence between identity and expression at runtime.

authority.description: Principal accountable for the engineering vertex at this DID's scope. Defaults to ${operator} on init for single-product DIDs.

inheritsFrom.description: Path to parent DID's engineering vertex. Absent for top-level DIDs.

complianceRegimes.description: Named regulatory or compliance constraints applied at this scope. Eρ₅ scope per RFC-0009 §7.1: HARD regulatory frameworks ONLY (GDPR, HIPAA, SOC2, PCI-DSS, FedRAMP, regional data-residency, regulated-industry rules).

dataRetention.description: Soul-specific data retention and isolation requirements.

slaTier.description: SLA tier appropriate to this soul's workload.

substrateInvariants.description: Named invariants the substrate must honor for this soul. Violations trigger Eτ_tessellation_drift per RFC-0009 §7.2.

product.description: Product vertex — accountable for identity declaration at this DID's scope.

authority.description: Principal accountable for the product vertex at this DID's scope. Defaults to ${operator} on init for single-product DIDs.

inheritsFrom.description: Path to parent DID's product vertex. Absent for top-level DIDs.

targetAudience.description: Target audience and persona for this soul.

problemResonance.description: Source-of-truth for Sα₁ scoring at this DID's scope.

successMetrics.description: Success metrics for this soul's work.

endgamePhase.description: Endgame phase mapping per platform lifecycle model.

tessellation.description: Present only on Tessellated DIDs (platform roots). Enumerates child Soul DIDs and cross-soul governance rules (RFC-0009 §5.2).

souls.description: Child Soul DIDs that tile into this Tessellated Platform.

soulId.description: Slug identifier for this soul within the tessellation.

didUri.description: URI reference to the Soul DID resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this soul within the tessellation.

inheritsSubstrate.description: Whether this soul inherits the platform Tessellated DID's substrate invariants. Defaults to true.

crossSoulScoringRule.description: Aggregation rule when substrate work affects multiple souls. Default `min` per RFC-0009 OQ-2 resolution. `weighted-traffic` and `weighted-revenue` are advanced — they require a data source the adopter must provide.

substrateInvariants.description: Named invariants ALL souls must honor. Violations trigger Eτ_tessellation_drift cross-soul drift detection (RFC-0009 §7.2).

stewardshipSplit.description: Split-authority stewardship per §4.4. Replaces v3 single-owner model.

productAuthority.description: Product-domain fields: Product owns, Design approves. Feeds SA-1 (Problem Resonance).

designAuthority.description: Design-domain fields: Design owns, Product approves. Feeds SA-2 (Vibe Coherence).

sharedAuthority.description: Shared fields: either pillar can propose, both must approve.

engineeringReview.description: Engineering reviewer on all fields, blocker only on measurableSignal and detectionPattern feasibility.

blockingScope.description: Dotted paths where Engineering can block on technical feasibility.

reviewCadence.description: Minimum review frequency. RFC-0008 §4.4 mandates quarterly minimum.

soulPurpose.description: Strategic intent. mission is Product-owned; designPrinciples are Design-owned.

constraints.description: Typed constraint declarations (Addendum B §B.3.2). Each compiles to a dep-parse detection rule. Product-owned.

designPrinciples.description: Design principles with structured measurable signals and anti-patterns. Design-owned.

value.description: Natural-language mission statement. Literal input to SA-1 (Problem Resonance).

constraint.description: Typed constraint declaration with dep-parse detection patterns.

detectionPatterns.description: Patterns compiled into dep-parse rules. Phase 2b gate requires ≥3 patterns per constraint.

scopeBoundaries.description: In-scope and out-of-scope term lists with synonyms. Compiled to keyword lists for scope gate.

outOfScope.description: Out-of-scope terms. Match on core entry triggers hard scope gate.

synonyms.description: Alternative terms. Phase 2b gate requires ≥2 synonyms per outOfScope entry.

antiPattern.description: Explicit rejection of an approach the product does not take.

detectionPatterns.description: Patterns compiled to term-matching rules. Phase 2b gate requires ≥3 patterns per global anti-pattern, ≥2 per principle-level.

measurableSignals.description: Structured measurable signals (replaces free-text measurableSignal from v4).

name.description: Reference to an existing DesignSystemBinding resource. Unidirectional — DSB does not back-reference the DID.

bindingType.description: authoritative: DID governs DSB intent. advisory: DID informs but does not govern.

syncFields.description: Field-level sync relationships between DID and DSB (sharedAuthority).

brandIdentity.description: Brand voice and visual identity. Design-owned.

voiceAntiPatterns.description: Voice anti-patterns (Addendum B). Phase 2b gate requires ≥2 voice anti-patterns.

tokenSchemaRef.description: Reference to the token source in the linked DesignSystemBinding (e.g., acme-design-system.spec.tokens).

visualConstraints.description: Measurable visual constraints checked against Learn phase metrics.

visualAntiPatterns.description: Visual anti-patterns. Phase 2b gate requires ≥2 visual anti-patterns.

experientialTargets.description: Experiential targets for SA-1 BM25 corpus. Product-owned.

compiledArtifactsHash.description: sha256 of the compiled BM25 + rule artifacts. Used by the reconciler to detect changes.

variantAudienceProfile.description: Variant-scoped audience characteristics. Mirrors Soul DID targetAudience structure. Feeds Sα₁ Problem/Audience Resonance when work items target this variant (RFC-0017 §5.4).

segments.description: Named audience segments this variant targets.

sizeRange.description: Staff/user size range for this audience.

variantDesignOverrides.description: Closed framework enum of visual-token surfaces the variant may specialize per RFC-0017 §6.1 + OQ-5 revisit (2026-05-26). voiceRegister cut per Design Authority editorial (6/6 leading design systems treat content register outside the visual token surface). Adopter extensions via vendor reverse-DNS prefix (e.g. 'acme.com/accessibilityProfile') are accepted via patternProperties; non-prefixed unknown keys are rejected.

colorPaletteOverlay.description: Additive color palette overlay over the soul's base palette.

densityProfile.description: Layout density character for this variant.

typographyScale.description: Typography scale character for this variant.

radiusProfile.description: Corner-rounding character for this variant (controls shape, not border stroke weight).

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]+(\\.[a-z][a-z0-9-]+)+\\/.description: Vendor-prefixed adopter extension. Key MUST follow reverse-DNS prefix convention (e.g. 'acme.com/accessibilityProfile').

variantDeclaration.description: One variant declaration on a Soul DID per RFC-0017 §5.1. Carries distinct visual identity specializations and audience targeting while inheriting the parent Soul's compliance regime and substrate invariants (§5.3 bounded inheritance).

id.description: Kebab-case variant identifier. Must be unique within the parent Soul DID.

complianceFloor.description: MUST be 'inherit'. Variants cannot diverge from soul compliance — schema validation rejects any other value (RFC-0017 §5.3 bounded inheritance).

designImperatives.description: Variant-scoped Sα₂ inputs layered on soul-level designImperatives. Variant wins on conflict per RFC-0017 §5.4 (most-specific declaration).

cardinality.description: RESERVED: future lifecycle hint per RFC-0017 §5.2. v1 ignores; documents the experimental exit ramp (OQ-8).
